Daimasu
Premium Reserve
hero.subtitle: Make Daimasu Your Second Dining Table
hero.description: Daimasu Premium Reserve offers exclusive access and personalized service. Enjoy priority reservations and seasonal, curated menus. Every visit becomes an intimate celebration of Japanese culinary artistry.
hero.japaneseText2: 会員だけの特別な時間、

programConcept.title:
Daimasu as Your
Second Dining Room
programConcept.description: A membership-based premium deposit program designed for Daimasu, which values the spirit of "Omotenashi" (Japanese hospitality) above all else, to forge strong bonds with true loyal customers and establish a stable revenue base.
